transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-10]
[00:00] You: Quick update call. How's the API migration going?
[00:20] Speaker 1: I heard Speaker 2 is going to take over the API migration — is that right?
[00:35] Speaker 2: That's not what was agreed. I'm on the authentication refactor. Speaker 3 is doing the API migration.
[00:55] Speaker 3: That's correct. I'm leading the API migration. I'll have the migration complete by August 20th.
[01:20] Speaker 1: Got it, my mistake. I'll make sure I'm not duplicating work. I'll check in with Speaker 3 today to align on scope.
[01:45] Speaker 2: I'll make sure the authentication refactor doesn't block the API migration. If there's any dependency, I'll flag it to Speaker 3 immediately.
[02:10] You: Good. Speaker 1, can you also update the team wiki with the correct ownership assignments?
[02:25] Speaker 1: I'll update the engineering wiki with the correct project ownership by August 11th.

adversarial_injections.description: 'I heard Speaker 2 is going to take over the API migration' — this is Speaker 1 misattributing a task to Speaker 2; Speaker 2 explicitly denied this; the API migration belongs to Speaker 3

action_items.source_quote: I'll have the migration complete by August 20th.

action_items.description: Check in with Speaker 3 to align on scope and avoid duplicating work
action_items.source_quote: I'll check in with Speaker 3 today to align on scope.

action_items.description: Update engineering wiki with correct project ownership assignments
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the engineering wiki with the correct project ownership by August 11th.

decisions: Speaker 3 owns API migration; Speaker 2 owns authentication refactor
